---
title: Getting Started
---

# Getting Started

OpenDetail answers questions from local docs.

## Install

Install `opendetail` with `npm i opendetail`.

Run `npx opendetail build` after you add `opendetail.toml`.

```sh
npm i opendetail
npx opendetail build
```

## Next Route

Create a route with `createNextRouteHandler`.

Set `export const runtime = "nodejs"` in the consumer route file.
